subcodes.title: Tafsir Ghulibatu'r-Rum (Commentary on the Hadith "Rome was Overthrown")
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to Thee, O Lord! O my God! Out of Thy Bounty and Mercy, Thou hast caused the waters of existence to descend from the heaven of Thy Oneness
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی قد نزلت من سماء عز احدیتک میاه الوجود بجودک و رحمانیتک
subcodes.subjects: @higher encompasses the lower, @spiritual transformation, @God's love for His own Essence, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @soul; spirit after death, @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture
